name: MALPOSITIONED TESTIS
definition: MALDESCENDED TESTIS arrested migration of testis along its normal course through internal inguinal ring, inguinal deviation from the usual pathway RETRACTILE TESTIS unusually spastic cremasteric muscle retractile testis + cryptorchidism

demographics.Associated with: prune belly syndrome (bilateral cryptorchidism), Prader-Willi syndrome,

dominant_finding: no spermatic cord in inguinal canal
discriminating_features: signal characteristics similar to contralateral / normal testis
